# vcs_ci corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === GitHub ===
# expect: GitHub Fine-grained PAT
github_pat_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === GitLab ===
# expect: GitLab Pipeline Trigger Token
glptt-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
# expect: GitLab Runner Authentication Token
glrt-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab Runner Registration Token
GR1348941AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab Deploy Token
gldt-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab CI/CD Job Token
glcbt-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab Feed Token
glft-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab Feature Flag Client Token
glffct-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab Incoming Mail Token
glimt-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab Kubernetes Agent Token
glagent-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab OAuth Application Secret
gloas-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab SCIM Token
glsoat-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: GitLab Session Cookie
_gitlab_session=AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === Bitbucket / Atlassian ===
# expect: Bitbucket App Password
ATBBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: Atlassian API Token (modern)
ATATT3xFfGAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA=BBBBBBBB
ATCTT3xFfGAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA=CCCCCCCC

# === Sourcegraph ===
# expect: Sourcegraph Access Token
sgp_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

# === CircleCI ===
# expect: CircleCI Personal API Token
CCIPAT_AAA_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

# === Buildkite ===
# expect: Buildkite Agent Token
bkua_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
# expect: Buildkite API Access Token
bkaa_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === Octopus / Harness ===
# expect: Octopus Deploy API Key
API-ABC123XYZABC123XYZABC123XY
# expect: Harness Personal Access Token
pat.AAAAAAAA.BBBBBBBB.CCCCCCCC
# expect: Harness Service Account Token
sat.AAAAAAAA.BBBBBBBB.CCCCCCCC

# === Travis ===
# expect: TravisCI Repo Encrypt Key
secure: "AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA=="

# === GitHub PAT (classic, new long ghs_ format) ===
# expect: GitHub Personal Access Token
ghs_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb.cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc

# === GitLab PAT (routable) ===
# expect: GitLab Personal Access Token (routable)
glpat-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA.a1bcdefgh
